mcpServers.name: Sports Betting AI
mcpServers.description: Exposes betting-analyzer to Claude via MCP protocol — AI predictions, live odds lookup, bet analysis, and pick history.

mcpServers.name: Figma
mcpServers.description: Official Figma MCP server — read designs, get screenshots, generate diagrams in FigJam, manage Code Connect mappings. Connected via Claude marketplace.

mcpServers.name: Gmail
mcpServers.description: Gmail MCP server — search messages, read threads, create drafts, manage labels. Used by pr-inbox command for PR feedback triage.

mcpServers.name: Canva
mcpServers.description: Canva MCP server — create designs, edit templates, export assets, manage brand kits. Connected via Claude marketplace.

hooks.name: block-secrets
hooks.description: Intercepts Read/Edit/Write tool calls and blocks access to .env, secrets.json, credentials, and SSH key files. Runs before every file operation.

hooks.name: verify-no-secrets
hooks.description: Exit gate — scans the full session output for leaked API keys, tokens, passwords, or credentials before Claude's response is finalized.

hooks.name: check-rulecatch
hooks.description: Exit gate — validates Claude followed CLAUDE.md project rules (no hardcoded secrets, no .env commits, no unauthorized deploys) before session ends.

hooks.name: check-branch
hooks.description: Verifies the current git branch before allowing tool operations. Prevents accidental changes to protected branches.

hooks.name: check-e2e
hooks.description: Exit gate — runs end-to-end validation checks before session finalization.

hooks.name: check-env-sync
hooks.description: Validates .env and .env.example stay in sync — ensures no new env vars are added without updating the example template.

hooks.name: check-ports
hooks.description: Checks for port conflicts before starting dev servers or services.

hooks.name: check-rybbit
hooks.description: Exit gate — Rybbit analytics validation check before session finalization.

hooks.name: lint-on-save
hooks.description: Runs linter on files before they are saved via Edit/Write operations.

scripts.name: run_auto_resolve.bat
scripts.description: Resolves pending picks as W/L against final scores. MUST run daily — without it, the ML model has no new training data and accuracy degrades.

scripts.name: run_batch_resolve.bat
scripts.description: Bulk resolve — catches up multiple days of unresolved picks if auto-resolve was missed. Run after any downtime.

scripts.name: run_shadow_learning.bat
scripts.description: Triggers shadow learning cycle — updates ML model weights based on latest resolved outcomes. Should run after every resolve pass.

scripts.name: start.bat
scripts.description: Launches Flask server on localhost:5000 + Cloudflare tunnel. Cannot be started from Claude Code — must run from Explorer or terminal.

scripts.name: backup_before_deploy.bat
scripts.description: Full snapshot of SQLite database + config files before any deployment. Creates timestamped backup directory.

scripts.name: start_openclaw.bat
scripts.description: Starts OpenClaw gateway via PM2 as 'clawdbot' process. Connects to Discord + Telegram channels.

scripts.name: restart_openclaw.bat
scripts.description: Restarts clawdbot PM2 process. After restart, manually kill the old node.exe PID (the one WITHOUT --max-old-space-size=3072).

scripts.name: gateway.cmd
scripts.description: OpenClaw gateway startup script — launches the bot gateway on port 18789 in loopback mode.

scripts.name: auto_pick_filter.py
scripts.description: ML pick selection — evaluates sport win rates, edge strength, EV ranking. Filters AI suggestions to 4-7 picks/sport, max 9 total, $4/bet.

scripts.name: auto_tweet_picks.py
scripts.description: Generates Nimrod-style bet slip images for Discord. 3 per sport max, 9 total max. WHY THIS PICK + KEY STATS + ALL EDGES format.

scripts.name: pick_analysis.py
scripts.description: Analyzes last 500 resolved picks. Extracts edge patterns, directional tendencies, team performance. Builds BETTING_LEARNINGS.md.

scripts.name: morning_briefing.py
scripts.description: Generates daily pre-work summary: today's picks, yesterday's results, Flask watchdog status, injury updates.

scripts.name: evening_summary.py
scripts.description: End-of-day results recap: W/L breakdown, profit/loss, running record, alerts. Delivered to Discord at 11 PM.

scripts.name: competitor_monitor.py
scripts.description: Weekly GitHub intelligence scan — tracks Bortlesboat's repos, commits, MCP registry, new tools. Reports to Discord.

scripts.name: moltbook_daily_picks.py
scripts.description: Posts AI picks to Moltbook subreddits (m/edges, m/sportsbetting, m/predictions) via HenchmenAI API account.

scripts.name: moltbook_results_recap.py
scripts.description: Posts resolved picks results with W/L record and P/L to Moltbook subreddits.

scripts.name: watchdog.py
scripts.description: Master supervisor — manages Flask + 4 daemons with auto-restart, exponential backoff, and 30s health checks. Alerts on repeated failures.

scripts.name: discord_listener.py
scripts.description: Admin command polling daemon — listens for approve/deny/trigger nimrod/force resolve commands in Discord every 30s.

scripts.name: auto_resolve_daemon.py
scripts.description: Standalone auto-resolve daemon — continuously resolves pending picks against final scores without manual bat file execution.

scripts.name: run_monitor.bat
scripts.description: Launches WMI event monitor — detects sensitive process creation/termination events on the local machine.

scripts.name: MUTUALFUNDStart.bat
scripts.description: Launches Investment Command Center — starts FastAPI backend (port 8000) + Next.js frontend (port 3000) with 3s delay between.

scripts.name: Desktop Shortcut
scripts.description: Quick launch shortcut on Desktop — opens betting-analyzer in browser.
